# Axio Marketing

> Web design and digital marketing agency based in Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, UK. Builds a complete bespoke website for free — clients only pay a one-off fee (£250–£1,000) once they approve it, plus £29/month hosting. No upfront cost, no long-term contracts.

## Business Details
- Address: Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, United Kingdom
- Phone: +44 1538 712402
- Email: axiomarketingltd@gmail.com
- Areas served: Peterborough, Stamford, Huntingdon, Ely, March, Wisbech, Cambridgeshire, Lincolnshire, Northamptonshire

## Services
- Web Design — bespoke websites, build-first model (see it before you pay), from £250 one-off + £29/month hosting
- SEO — local and national SEO, on-page optimisation, Google Business Profile management, link building
- Digital Marketing — Facebook Ads, Google Ads, email marketing, content strategy
- Social Media Management — 1–3 posts daily across Instagram, Facebook & TikTok
- Physical/Print Marketing — business cards, flyers, posters & banners

## Pages
- [Homepage](https://axiomarketing.co.uk/index.html): Overview, process, portfolio, pricing, FAQ and contact form
- [Web Design Peterborough](https://axiomarketing.co.uk/web-design-peterborough.html): Flagship local web design landing page with portfolio, areas served, pricing and FAQ
- [Build First, Pay Later](https://axiomarketing.co.uk/build-first.html): Explains the build-first, pay-after-approval model with step-by-step process and FAQ
- [SEO Services](https://axiomarketing.co.uk/seo.html): Local SEO services for Peterborough & Cambridgeshire
- [Digital Marketing](https://axiomarketing.co.uk/digital-marketing.html): Facebook Ads, Google Ads, email marketing
- [Social Media Management](https://axiomarketing.co.uk/media-management.html): Daily social media posting across Instagram, Facebook & TikTok
- [Print & Physical Advertising](https://axiomarketing.co.uk/physical.html): Business cards, flyers, posters and banners

- EJ Cuts (barbershop): https://ejcutz.com
- Maison De May Beauty (eyebrow technician): https://maison-de-may.vercel.app/
